name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
Lady 4-Compartment Black Matte Leather with Letter Strap in stock!!️
The matte leather Lady that everyone has been longing for is finally here❤️. This size is between the 3 and 5 compartments, practical yet exquisite, and much more durable than lambskin😌. It stands out when worn, elegant or casual, the best choice for any look👏🏻
size:20cm
